'''navoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyjer|nyjer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyjer|nyjer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| navoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || næveheth || nævehej || nævehesh || nævehe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || navovohoth || navovohoj || navovohosh || navovoho
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || navohoth || navohoj || navohosh || navoho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || navofhofth || navofhofj || navofhofsh || navofhof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || navohotho || navohojo || navohosho || navohoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || navohoth || navohoj || navohosh || navoho
|-
| [[Possessive]] || navohothol || navohojol || navohoshol || navohokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || navohoothotho || navohoojojo || navohooshosho || navohooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || navohothon || navohojon || navohoshon || navohokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || navohothooro || navohojooro || navohoshooro || navohokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
